Sound Familiar?

When things get busy,
the back end quietly breaks down.

Bookings Slip Through

Follow-ups don't go out. Clients quietly book somewhere else without you ever knowing.

Invoices Pile Up

Estimates sit unsent. Cash flow tightens for no reason other than not enough hours in the day.

Inquiries Go Unanswered

New patients reach out and don't hear back. They move on and you never knew the opportunity was there.

None of this is your fault. It's what happens when there aren't enough hours in the day. That's exactly what we fix.

What We Handle

Everything your clinic needs,
handled remotely.

Scheduling & Confirmations

Bookings, rescheduling, and confirmations so your calendar stays full.

Patient Follow-Ups

Every patient hears back. No one falls through the cracks.

Invoicing & Tracking

Invoices go out on time. Outstanding balances followed up consistently.

Treatment Estimates & Intake

New patient paperwork and estimates handled before they arrive.

Email & Calendar Management

Your inbox and calendar organized, responded to, under control.

CRM & System Updates

Jane App, Mindbody, and other platforms kept current and accurate.

Consultation Follow-Up Sequences

Leads that didn't book get a structured follow-up to convert more.

SOP Building

Every process documented so nothing depends on memory.

How It Works

From first call to fully
running in 48 hours.

01
Book a Discovery Call

We spend 15 minutes learning about your clinic, your current admin setup, and where things are slipping. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation to see if we're a fit.

02
We Onboard & Set Up

Once you're ready to move forward, we send a simple agreement and book a short onboarding call. We get access to your systems, learn your preferences, and get organized — all within 48 hours.

03
We Handle Everything

From that point forward, your back office runs. Follow-ups go out, invoices are sent, scheduling is managed, and you receive a weekly summary every Friday. You focus on your clients. We handle the rest.

A full-time admin typically costs $45,000–$60,000/year including salary, benefits, and payroll. Her Desk Co. starts at $1,500/month — no overhead, no onboarding delays, full flexibility.

Our Story

Built by a woman who saw
the gap firsthand.

Women
Owned

Her Desk Co. was founded on a simple observation: the most overwhelmed person in a growing aesthetic clinic is almost always the owner.

They're performing treatments, managing staff, marketing their business — and somewhere in between, trying to keep up with everything the back office demands.

We are a women-owned remote administrative support agency built specifically for medical aesthetic clinics and medspas. We build systems, document processes, and become the back office your clinic needs to grow.

We work with a small number of clinics at a time — intentionally — so every client gets real attention and real results.

Meet the Founder
Jade Rancourt
Founder
"When you work with Her Desk Co., nothing falls through the cracks. Ever."

I started Her Desk Co. because I've seen firsthand what happens when a clinic's back office can't keep up with its growth. Patients slip. Revenue is left on the table. The owner ends up doing work that shouldn't be on their plate.

I bring real medical administrative experience, a structured approach, and genuine care for every clinic I work with.

FAQ

Questions we get asked.

No. Month to month. Scale up, scale down, or cancel with 30 days notice. No lock-ins, no penalties.
Jane App, Mindbody, Google Workspace, HubSpot, Wave, and more. If you use something different, we learn it quickly and are fully operational within the first two weeks.
Every Friday you receive a weekly summary of everything completed. Growth Plan clients also receive a bi-weekly check-in call.
Within 48–72 hours of signing. A short onboarding call, access to your systems, and we get started. No delays.
Yes. All patient and clinic information is treated with full confidentiality. We are happy to sign an NDA before onboarding begins.
Yes — full support in English and French, making us a strong fit for clinics serving bilingual or francophone patients across Canada.
